title: PGA HOPE - 211info
text: PGA HOPE PACIFIC NORTHWEST PGA HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 6-8 week golf program taught by PGA professionals who are trained in adaptive golf and military cultural competency with a focus on veterans with physical and cognitive conditions, such as Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI), Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD), and amputees. Also provides golf equipment to participants. 6989 Littlerock Road SW Tumwater, WA 98512 Eligibility: Veterans and active duty military members Hours: Varies by tournament dates Email (360) 456-6496 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (360) 456-6496 Main phone Main phone (360) 456-6496 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports * Active Military General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Veterans General Recreational Activities/Sports * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PGA HOPE PACIFIC NORTHWEST
